## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webflow and GrowthX to discuss progress on integration pages, guides, and potential new projects.](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ramping up publishing of integration pages, aiming for 30/week with minimal human review](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Guides workflow being developed; prioritization based on organic traffic and important integrations](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Exploring potential for creating a component library for Webflow code components](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
  - [Webflow Conference next week; Luke and Colin unavailable](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=2404.0)

## Topics

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [Aiming to publish 30 integration pages per week](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Human review focused on major inaccuracies; tone and word choice to be fixed post-publishing](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Prioritization based on SEMrush data for search volume](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [\~150 initial integrations chosen based on high search volume](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [Additional integrations added based on perceived importance/familiarity](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)

### Guides Development

  - [Mapped numerous guides, building workflow and prioritizing list](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Prioritization framework not finalized, but likely based on organic traffic and integration importance](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Decision to generally create separate guides for each integration (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) rather than combining](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)

### Editorial Content

  - [Two pieces in Webflow's core content](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Currently producing 1-2 pieces per week to refine workflow](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [API key now working, enabling more efficient publishing](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

### Webflow Code Components

  - [Discussion on potential to create a component library similar to ShadCN](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Components would inherit Webflow site styling](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Estimated potential for hundreds of simpler components](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore feasibility and potential scope of this project](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)

### Webflow Cloud Limitations

  - [Current lack of database hosting in Webflow Cloud](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Features in development, but not yet fully implemented](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to focus on ramping up integration page creation](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [Develop and finalize guides workflow](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore feasibility of code component library project](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
  - [Async communication next week due to Webflow Conference](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=2404.0)
  - [Continue refining editorial content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/npDEx7iijuuVmCdrhGDwDz5YVT4e_QLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
